name: Compare
description: A before/after image comparison slider that lets users drag a divider to reveal two overlapping images, with smooth motion and touch support.
whenToUse: Use for before/after comparisons, design previews, photo editing showcases, or any scenario requiring side-by-side visual comparison.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the compare container

props.name: slideMode
props.description: Whether the slider follows hover position or requires dragging
